summary: Memecoins are coins with no cash flows or utility whose price is driven entirely by attention, celebrity endorsement, and reflexive speculation. Three repeatable patterns recur: (1) celebrity/influencer pumps where a single tweet or event spikes an existing coin, (2) brand-new "launch-day" tokens (politician coins, pump.fun coins) that go parabolic in hours then collapse 80-98% as insiders dump, and (3) the broader "memecoin season" where froth across the whole sector marks a late-cycle, risk-on top that precedes a market-wide drawdown. For a trader, peak memecoin euphoria has historically been a contrarian sell signal for the entire crypto market, while individual launch tokens are almost always a loss for late buyers.

archetypes.name: Celebrity / Influencer Pump on an Existing Memecoin
archetypes.mechanism: A high-follower individual (Elon Musk, Mark Cuban) tweets or publicly endorses an existing memecoin (DOGE, SHIB). Retail FOMO buyers chase the spike on near-zero float depth, driving a fast parabolic move. The other side is early holders and the influencer's own implicit positioning who distribute into the retail bid. Late buyers consistently lose because the catalyst is a one-off attention shock with no fundamental follow-through; once the news is priced and the tweet stops, liquidity vanishes and price mean-reverts. The 'sell-the-event' dynamic is acute when the catalyst is a scheduled, hyped event (e.g. the SNL appearance) — the run-up front-runs the event and the event itself triggers profit-taking.
archetypes.typical_duration: hours to a few days; scheduled-event pumps fade within 24h of the event
archetypes.typical_magnitude_pct: +20% to +600% on the named coin into the catalyst; -20% to -40% sell-the-news reversal within 24-48h
archetypes.recurrence: very high during bull markets — Musk alone moved DOGE on a dozen+ occasions across Jan-May 2021 and again in 2024-2026
leading_signals: spike in social mentions / Google Trends for the coin name
scheduled celebrity media appearance announced in advance
run-up in price + volume in days before a hyped event
influencer follower count vs coin float (thin float amplifies)
Robinhood/exchange app outages from order volume

historical_instances.trigger: Elon Musk tweets 'Doge' and 'Dogecoin is the people's crypto' amid the WallStreetBets/SatoshiStreetBets retail frenzy; GameStop-style social pump
historical_instances.description: DOGE spiked ~140% intraday on Jan 28 2021 (to ~$0.0176) and ran more than +600% over the late-January window on Musk tweets and Reddit coordination, reaching its first record high in early February 2021. Multi-day run-up exceeded +800% by the time brokers restricted trading.
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: Reddit/SatoshiStreetBets coordinated buying; exchange order surges

historical_instances.trigger: Elon Musk tweet ('Doge Barking at the Moon') plus broad retail mania; DOGE hits record high
historical_instances.description: DOGE surged roughly +200% in one day on Apr 16 2021, attributed to Musk rather than WallStreetBets, to a new record high.

historical_instances.trigger: Elon Musk hosts Saturday Night Live; called himself 'the Dogefather'. Classic scheduled-event sell-the-news.
historical_instances.description: DOGE ran up to its all-time high ~$0.7316 (CoinGecko) ahead of SNL, then fell ~30% during/around the broadcast (from roughly $0.70-0.74 to ~$0.50) as holders sold into the event; Robinhood was overwhelmed by DOGE volume.
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: Robinhood briefly overwhelmed by DOGE trading volume during broadcast

historical_instances.trigger: Tweets from Elon Musk and Mark Cuban endorsing DOGE
historical_instances.description: DOGE spiked again on Musk + Cuban tweets in late April 2021 amid the broader retail mania. Exact magnitude not corroborated; figure is an estimate.

historical_instances.trigger: Retail mania / 'Dogecoin-killer' narrative + Robinhood listing speculation drives SHIB to its all-time high
historical_instances.description: SHIB rallied several hundred percent through October 2021 to an all-time high of ~$0.00008845 on Oct 28 2021, briefly topping a ~$34B market cap.

archetypes.name: Launch-Day Parabolic Token (Politician / Pump.fun / Celebrity Coin)
archetypes.mechanism: A brand-new token launches with almost all supply held by insiders/team and a thin public float. A loud endorsement or hype event (a politician's own announcement, a celebrity, or a viral pump.fun coin) drives a vertical price move within minutes to hours as retail piles in. Insiders and sniper bots that bought pre-announcement (sometimes seconds before) sell into the retail bid. Late buyers almost always lose because the float-unlock and insider distribution overwhelms demand once attention peaks. This is a near-pure wealth transfer from late retail to insiders/snipers; the LIBRA case showed ~86% of participants lost money. Directional bias is bullish only for the first minutes/hours and sharply bearish thereafter.
archetypes.typical_lag: the pump is immediate (minutes); the dump follows within hours to days
archetypes.typical_duration: peak within 24h; 80-98% collapse over days to weeks
archetypes.typical_magnitude_pct: +1000% to +10000% in the first hours, then -80% to -98% from peak within weeks
archetypes.recurrence: extremely high during froth windows — pump.fun launched thousands daily in late 2024 / early 2025; politician coins clustered Jan-Feb 2025
leading_signals: insider/sniper wallets buying seconds-to-minutes before public announcement
pct of supply held by team/top wallets
explosive first-hour volume with vertical price

historical_instances.trigger: Donald Trump launches the OFFICIAL TRUMP memecoin days before his inauguration
historical_instances.description: TRUMP launched Jan 17 2025 and surged to a peak of ~$74.27 on Jan 19 (~$14.5B market cap) within ~2 days, then fell to ~$15.30 by Feb 11 — roughly -79% from peak in weeks. (CoinGecko measured -52.4% over Jun-Dec 2025 from a ~$11.18 base, reflecting continued bleed.)
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: massive inflows into Solana memecoins; pump.fun daily revenue hit ~$15M/day record early Jan 2025

historical_instances.trigger: Melania Trump launches the MELANIA memecoin one day after TRUMP
historical_instances.description: MELANIA peaked ~$13.73 shortly after launch (~$2.1B market cap), then dropped to ~$1.44 by Feb 11 — roughly -90% within weeks (the $133.73 figure cited elsewhere appears spurious). 24 wallets bought ~$2.6M of MELANIA ~2.5 minutes before the public announcement, netting tens of millions — clear insider pre-positioning.
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: insider wallets bought ~$2.6M ~2.5 min before announcement, multi-million-dollar payday

historical_instances.trigger: Argentine President Javier Milei promotes the LIBRA memecoin on X
historical_instances.description: LIBRA surged to ~$5.00-$5.20 (~$4.5-4.6B market cap) within ~40 minutes, then crashed ~89% within ~3 hours and >96% from peak shortly after as insiders dumped liquidity. Insiders extracted roughly $87-107M; ~86% of investors lost money. Triggered a federal fraud investigation of Milei.
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: insiders withdrew liquidity; ~$87-107M extracted; large aggregate retail losses

historical_instances.trigger: BOME (Book of Meme) launches on Solana during peak memecoin season; Binance listing within days
historical_instances.description: BOME launched Mar 14 2024 and reached an all-time high ~$0.02805 on Mar 16 (~$1.9B market cap) — a roughly 56,000x move from a fractional launch price per Trust Wallet — listed on Binance within days. Archetypal launchpad parabola followed by a sharp reversal.
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: Solana memecoin sector market cap surged past ~$5.8B in Q1 2024

historical_instances.trigger: Fartcoin (largest pump.fun-launched token) hits a new all-time high during peak launchpad froth
historical_instances.description: Fartcoin jumped sharply (reported ~+44% in a single day) to a new ATH in early January 2025; emblematic of pump.fun-driven memecoin fever where launchpad memecoins peaked at a high share of total memecoin market cap in Jan 2025. The exact single-day percent is not independently corroborated.
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: pump.fun ~$15M/day record revenue early Jan 2025; launchpad memecoins a large share of memecoin mcap

archetypes.name: Memecoin Season as a Late-Cycle Risk-On Top Signal
archetypes.mechanism: When speculative capital rotates down the risk curve into the lowest-quality assets (memecoins), it signals that the marginal buyer is exhausted and dry powder is being spent on pure gambling rather than on BTC/large-caps. Peak memecoin froth — record launchpad revenue, parabolic joke coins, politician coins, celebrity coins — has repeatedly coincided with or immediately preceded the cycle top in the broader crypto market. The other side: smart money / early holders distribute large-cap and memecoin positions into euphoric retail. Once froth peaks, the whole sector deflates 75-80% and capital consolidates back into BTC, dragging alts down harder than BTC. Direction is bearish for the forward 1-6 month return of the broad market once the froth-peak signal fires.
archetypes.typical_lag: froth peak leads the broad top by days to a few weeks
archetypes.typical_duration: sector drawdown plays out over months; -75% to -80% peak-to-trough in memecoin market cap
archetypes.typical_magnitude_pct: memecoin sector market cap -75% to -80% from cycle peak; broad market correction of -20% to -50%+
archetypes.recurrence: once per major cycle (2021, late-2024/early-2025); froth peaks recurred each bull phase
leading_signals: memecoin sector market cap at record + as a rising share of total crypto mcap
launchpad (pump.fun) daily revenue at record highs
politician/celebrity coins launching (peak novelty, then novelty exhaustion)
memecoin share of total mcap above a high threshold
negative funding flips / BTC dominance starting to rise

historical_instances.trigger: Memecoin sector spikes +$8B to ~$47B in days (early Jan 2026), then fully round-trips within the month.
historical_instances.description: Memecoins rebounded from 2025 lows, adding >$8B to reach ~$47B market cap by Jan 5 2026 (+~30% in days; sector volume ~$9.2B, up ~87% YoY in 2026). The spikes were violent - intra-month MAX RUNUPS: PEPE +77%, BONK +76%, FLOKI +55%, SHIB +40%, DOGE +31% (DOGE briefly broke a year-long downtrend). But the froth fully ROUND-TRIPPED within January: every name closed the month NEGATIVE (DOGE -12.9%, FLOKI -13.5%, BONK -5.9%, SHIB -3.7%, PEPE ~flat) with -33% to -47% max drawdowns. A textbook risk-on memecoin spike-and-fade and an early-2026 froth top that preceded the broad 2025-26 bear. OFFICIAL TRUMP remains a political-beta play that pops on Trump-crypto-positive news. DATA-INTEGRITY NOTE: a separately-claimed 'DOGE +8% June-2026 alt-season rally' is FALSE - DOGE was -12.5% (Jun 1-4 2026) in the risk-off crash; June 2026 was Bitcoin Season, not alt-season.
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: Sector +$8B to ~$47B (Jan 5); volume ~$9.2B (+87% YoY in 2026); PumpSwap record $1.2B day.

historical_instances.trigger: Post-froth deflation: DOGE (sector bellwether) continues bleeding as risk-off persists and capital consolidates into BTC
historical_instances.description: Real CoinGecko measurement: DOGE -31.0% from 2025-11-01 to 2025-12-15 (start $0.186, end $0.129), with a -32.0% intra-window max drawdown — illustrating the sustained sector deflation that follows a memecoin-froth top.

historical_instances.trigger: TRUMP/MELANIA launch + record pump.fun revenue mark peak memecoin novelty; LIBRA Feb 14 confirms exhaustion
historical_instances.description: Memecoin mania peaked mid-to-late January 2025 (TRUMP ~$14.5B mcap, record pump.fun ~$15M/day revenue). The LIBRA collapse Feb 14 is widely cited as the late-cycle exhaustion signal that suppressed memecoin risk appetite for months; the 2024-25 memecoin sector peaked near ~$120-150B (CoinGecko) then declined roughly 75%.
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: launchpad memecoins rose to a large share of memecoin mcap into Jan 2025, then collapsed; pump.fun revenue rolled over

historical_instances.trigger: Solana memecoin season peaks (WIF ATH ~Mar 31, BOME/SLERF launches) ahead of a Q2 2024 alt drawdown
historical_instances.description: dogwifhat (WIF) hit an all-time high near $4.85 in late March 2024; the SOL memecoin sector reached ~$5.8B+. This Q1-2024 froth peak preceded a multi-month memecoin/alt cooldown into mid-2024. WIF ATH date and pct gain not independently corroborated here.
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: SOL memecoin sector mcap >$5.8B at Q1-2024 peak

historical_instances.trigger: Memecoin froth peaks (DOGE SNL ATH May 8, SHIB launch hype) coinciding with the 2021 cycle's first major top; memecoin sector mcap peaked ~$88-90B
historical_instances.description: The 2021 memecoin sector peaked around $88-90B (spring/summer 2021) then crashed ~78-80% below $20B. DOGE's ~$0.73 ATH and the SNL sell-the-news marked froth exhaustion just before BTC's mid-May 2021 ~53% crash (~$64k to ~$30k by late July).
historical_instances.volume_or_flow_change: memecoin sector mcap from ~$88-90B to under $20B
